Your Brand,
Brought to Life.

A visual identity system and scalable asset package built for how Skylo actually works. Not a rebrand. Not a strategy exercise. Just the tools your team needs to move fast and look great doing it.

View the Scope See Pricing
How we work

Built for speed,
quality, and flexibility.

Designed for Speed

Once the visual system is in place, production moves fast. Quick, agile iteration cycles with direct access to your creative lead and PM. No layers, no lag.

Designed for Quality

No reliance on generic stock photography. Custom, tailored visual approach. Examples chosen to match Skylo's design bar.

Designed for Flexibility

Modular scope: scale up or down as needed. Scalable from quick-turn requests to larger refresh work. Can run in parallel with contractor hiring.

Phase 1

The Skylo
Vibe Guide.

Everything your team needs to keep the brand consistent, sharp, and ready to scale. Not a 50-page PDF that sits on a shelf. A practical, visual-first system.

  • Visual identity refinement (color, type, logo usage, do's and don'ts)
  • Photography direction (style, mood, application guidance)
  • Video direction (style, pacing, tone references)
  • Motion direction (animation principles, transitions, energy level)
  • Tone examples: "What Skylo is / What Skylo isn't"
  • Brand application mockups (3 sample surfaces)
  • Practical usage guide for internal and external teams
Phase 1 Investment
$20,500
164 credits · Visual identity + brand guide
Format PDF + source files
Deliverable Vibe Guide + assets
Timeline 4-6 weeks
Phase 2

Scalable assets,
ready to deploy.

Once the vibe guide is locked, we build the assets your team needs to move. Each item is scoped independently and can be added at any time.

Asset Description Est. Credits Est. Cost
Website Refresh See options below Varies See options
Slide Templates Branded deck, up to 15 layouts 50 - 60 $6,250 - $7,500
Social Templates Production-ready social ad set 12 - 20 $1,500 - $2,500

Motion Graphics Templates Animated intros, transitions, lower thirds 50+ $6,250+
Skylo-Certified Sticker Designs Badge/sticker system for partner program 10+ $1,250+
Baseline Imagery / Asset Library Up to 5 categories, 15 stock images each (75 total options) 28+ $3,500+
Stationery + Print Collateral Letterhead, business cards, envelopes 16 $2,000
Ebook / Editorial Design Up to 10 pages, design only 35 $4,375

Event Signage 2 concepts, booth backdrop + 1-2 banners 45 $5,625

All assets are scoped in SketchDeck credits at $125/credit. Estimates confirmed at time of scoping.

Website refresh

Three ways to approach
the website.

Pick the level that fits your timeline and budget. All options build on the vibe guide foundation.

Option A: Lightweight Refresh

  • Restyle key pages with updated brand system
  • Apply new typography, color, and imagery
  • Design only, no development
  • Scope: 3-5 core pages
50 - 80 credits
$6,250 - $10,000

Option B: Mid-Level Refresh

Recommended
  • Everything in Option A, plus development
  • Content structure and copywriting
  • New page layouts, responsive build
  • Scope: 3-5 core pages, design + dev + content
280 - 400 credits
$35,000 - $50,000

Option C: Full Website Overhaul

  • Complete redesign from the ground up
  • New information architecture + content
  • Custom interactions and animations
  • Scope: Full site, design + dev + content
Custom scoping required
TBD
Pricing model

Flexible credits.
Transparent tracking.

Purchase credits upfront. Use them across any design need. No rigid retainer. No surprises.

Credit-Based

Purchase a block of credits and deploy them across any asset type.

Direct Access

Work directly with your creative lead and dedicated PM.

Fast Turnaround

Once the vibe guide is set, production moves quickly.

Transparent Tracking

Real-time visibility into credit usage and remaining balance.

Credit Rate $125 / credit

Selected Work

Our Work

TAKKT Foodservices

A two-year strategic partnership to reformulate four brands: TAKKT Foodservices corporate, Hubert Company, Central Restaurant Products, and a newly named product brand, SureFit Parts. SketchDeck led brand strategy, visual identity, messaging guidelines, launch campaigns, and a full spectrum of brand applications.

TAKKT Foodservices
Brand identity applied to print. A brochure spread bringing the "Boundaryless potential" positioning to life.
Brand Identity
TAKKT Foodservices
Brand launch social posts with consistent voice and visual system across a suite of LinkedIn creative.
Social Media
Hubert Company
Sample homepage design for Hubert Company. "See the path to possible," brand applied to a digital product surface.
Web Design
Hubert Company
Print ad execution. Dark, commanding creative that extends the brand into trade and print channels.
Print / Advertising
SureFit Parts
Email and mobile web design for a newly named product brand. Sharp, utilitarian, and built for a B2B audience.
Email / Digital
SureFit Parts
"Less downtime. More uptime." Homepage design for SureFit Parts, built to convert high-volume foodservice buyers.
Web Design
Klarity.ai

Klarity Intelligence needed a clear strategic position and visual identity to connect with prospects, customers, and employees. SketchDeck partnered end-to-end, from strategy through messaging, visual identity, and brand expressions across every customer touchpoint. The result: a brand grounded in Illumination, building trust while piquing curiosity about what's ahead.

Klarity.ai
"Not sure where to go next? We'll help." OOH billboard translating brand strategy into a sharp, confident market presence.
